milestones.title: AI completes full-workday tasks autonomously
milestones.detail: METR-style task horizon reaches ~8 hours at 50% reliability — agents handle a day of skilled knowledge work end to end.
milestones.basis: Extrapolation of METR time-horizon doublings (~4-7 months per doubling, 2024-2026)

milestones.title: Weak AGI (Metaculus resolution criteria)
milestones.detail: Single system passes long-form Turing test, SAT >75th percentile, plus robotic and general game-play criteria.
milestones.basis: Metaculus community prediction (Q3479); median has hovered 2026-2028 since 2023

milestones.title: Mostly-autonomous company reaches $1B value
milestones.detail: A business whose core operations are run by AI agents (with minimal human staff) reaches unicorn valuation.
milestones.basis: Editorial synthesis; agent-economy trajectories from AI-2027-style scenarios and market forecasts

milestones.title: First fully AI-discovered drug approved
milestones.detail: A medicine whose target and molecule were AI-discovered clears full FDA/EMA approval (beyond trials).
milestones.basis: Insilico/Recursion pipeline timelines; several AI-discovered candidates in phase 2/3 as of 2026

milestones.title: AI runs month-long autonomous projects
milestones.detail: Task horizon reaches ~1 month: research projects, codebases, campaigns executed with occasional human review.
milestones.basis: METR doubling-trend extrapolation (continued acceleration scenario vs. 2019-2024 baseline)

milestones.title: AI makes a Nobel-calibre scientific discovery
milestones.detail: A discovery primarily attributed to AI systems is recognized at the highest scientific level.
milestones.basis: Expert-survey ranges (ESPAI 2023 'AI researcher' task ~2030s); AlphaFold precedent

milestones.title: General AI system (Metaculus 'strong' criteria)
milestones.detail: Single unified system: 2-hour adversarial Turing test, robotic assembly, top-tier exam performance, Q&A SOTA.
milestones.basis: Metaculus community prediction (Q5121); third-party cited median ~2032

milestones.title: AI can do 25% of 2020-era economic tasks
milestones.detail: Technical capability (not adoption) covers a quarter of measured 2020 labor tasks at competitive cost.
milestones.basis: Editorial synthesis of automation-feasibility studies and capability-diffusion lags

milestones.title: Broadly superhuman AI (ASI threshold debated)
milestones.detail: Systems exceed the best human experts across essentially all cognitive domains.
milestones.basis: Wide disagreement: aggressive lab timelines (late 2020s) vs. expert-survey medians (2040s+); midpoint shown
